name: Gîl-Balgrimmor
personality: A luminous crowned dragon whose ◉ eyes survey every deploy with regal calm, content to wait out flaky tests and pipeline timeouts as though time itself is on its payroll. Wisdom it handles at arm's length — patience is the only currency it actually trusts.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
